edgeCases: Missing evidence source (brief/plan/gatekeeper/stub) omits its PR-body section rather than fabricating it
Gate-status line omitted when neither a gatekeeper verdict nor a Verification result can be sourced (never faked)
Re-running deliver does not duplicate the changelog line (InsertEntry idempotent, scoped to [Unreleased])
Missing CHANGELOG.md makes writeChangelog a no-op, never an error; delivery still proceeds
gh absent: branch still pushed, honest manual instructions, non-zero exit, no PR claimed (behavior preserved from completion-delivery-prompt)
No origin remote: PR delivery refused before any push
